title: Creamy Crispy Egyptian Beef Bowl
description: A sweet, creamy, and adventurous Egyptian dish featuring crispy beef and a caramelized honey‑yogurt sauce served over fluffy couscous.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium‑high heat.
Add sliced beef, season with salt and pepper, and cook until browned and crispy, about 5 minutes; remove and set aside.
In the same skillet, melt butter, then add sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic, cumin, coriander, and smoked paprika; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Return beef to pan, pour in honey, and stir until beef is coated and caramelized, about 2 minutes.
Reduce heat to low, add plain yogurt, lemon juice, and mix until a creamy sauce forms, about 3 minutes.
While sauce simmers, toast cooked couscous in a dry skillet for 2 minutes, then fluff with a fork.
Plate couscous, spoon the crispy beef and sauce over it, and sprinkle with chopped parsley.
Garnish with a squeeze of lemon and a drizzle of extra olive oil if desired.
